## ○ 概要 &nbsp;·&nbsp; About

<br>

<div align="center" style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:24px; justify-content:center;">
  <img src="./emblem-2.svg" width="140" alt="emblem"/>
  <div align="left">

I'm **Dave**, a BS Information Technology student. I enjoy learning how systems work, how they break, and how to keep them from breaking. Right now that curiosity is split between a cybersecurity, cloud, and few side projects built to put the theory into practice.

  </div>
</div>

<br>

## ○ 作品 &nbsp;·&nbsp; Top Projects

<div align="center" style="display:flex; align-items:center; gap:24px; justify-content:center;">
  <div align="left">

<br>

[![Packet-Maxxin](https://img.shields.io/badge/Packet_Maxxin-0f1c42?style=for-the-badge&logo=cisco&logoColor=ece7d8&labelColor=010d28)](#)
A collection of hands-on activities of cisco packet tracer to excercise my networking skills.

[![Kalinga](https://img.shields.io/badge/Kalinga-0f1c42?style=for-the-badge&logo=android&logoColor=ece7d8&labelColor=010d28)](#)
Connects BPO agents directly to HMOs to cut Letter of Authorization (LOA) approval time using AI solutions.

[![Brute Force Demo](https://img.shields.io/badge/Brute_Force_Demo-0f1c42?style=for-the-badge&logo=python&logoColor=ece7d8&labelColor=010d28)](#)
An insecure website created solely for demonstrating brute force attack using word list.

  </div>
  <img src="./emblem-2.svg" width="140" alt="spark emblem"/>
</div>
